title: PatternFamily
description: Schema for PatternFamily entities representing high-level groupings of related construction patterns within a specific domain.

id.description: Unique identifier for the pattern family, following the DNA-CONSTR-FAM naming convention.

name.description: Human-readable name of the pattern family.

description.description: Detailed description of the pattern family, its purpose, and scope within the construction domain.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON schema definition used to validate the entity.

pattern_language_version.description: Version of the Construction Pattern Language specification this entity conforms to.

entity_revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number for this entity, incremented on each update.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was originally created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was last modified.

domain.description: The construction domain or discipline this pattern family belongs to (e.g., structural, mechanical, electrical, envelope).

patterns.description: Ordered list of pattern identifiers that belong to this family.

items.description: Reference to a Pattern entity ID.

detail_intents.description: Optional list of high-level design intents or goals that this pattern family addresses.

notes.description: Free-form notes, commentary, or additional context about the pattern family.
